com.jsyn.unitgen

Class UnitOscillator

  • java.lang.Object
    • com.jsyn.unitgen.UnitGenerator
      • com.jsyn.unitgen.UnitOscillator
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    UnitSource, UnitVoice
    Direct Known Subclasses:
    FunctionOscillator, ImpulseOscillator, PulseOscillator, RedNoise, SawtoothOscillator, SawtoothOscillatorBL, SawtoothOscillatorDPW, SineOscillator, SquareOscillator, TriangleOscillator

    public abstract class UnitOscillator
extends UnitGenerator
implements UnitVoice
    Base class for all oscillators.
    Author:
    Phil Burk (C) 2009 Mobileer Inc

      • noteOn

        public void noteOn(double freq,
                   double ampl,
                   TimeStamp timeStamp)
        Description copied from interface: UnitVoice
        Play whatever you consider to be a note on this voice. Do not be constrained by traditional definitions of notes or music.
        Specified by:
        noteOn in interface UnitVoice
        Parameters:
        freq - in Hz related to the perceived pitch of the note.
        ampl - generally between 0.0 and 1.0
        timeStamp - when to play the note

      • usePreset

        public void usePreset(int presetIndex)
        Specified by:
        usePreset in interface UnitVoice
